name: Silent Asylum 2
description: Silent Asylum 2 features eerie atmosphere of a foggy town where your mission is to shoot scary monsters using different weapons and find the exit on each level in order to progress with your adventure.
instructions: WASD - Move LMB - Shoot RMB - Aim Flashlight Space - Jump R - Reload G - Grenade F - Use C - Crouch Shift - Run
tags: 3D, 3D Games, Action, First Person Shooter, Gun, Horror, Shoot, Shoot 'Em Up, Shooter, Shooting, Unity3D
